# Project Coding Standards

## Naming

- Use camelCase for all variable and function names
- Use PascalCase for types, interfaces, and classes
- File names must use kebab-case

## Code Quality

- Never use any type in TypeScript code
- No console.log in production code
- Use named exports only, no default exports

## Structure

- Every public function must have a JSDoc comment
- Files must not exceed 300 lines

## Testing

- Every source file must have a corresponding test file

## Imports

- Imports must use relative paths, no path aliases
